title: Charred Italian Leek Panforte
description: A hearty and flavorful Italian panforte dish featuring tender charred leeks, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Trim the leeks, discarding the tough green tops.
Cut the leeks in half lengthwise and separate the rings.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the leeks and cook for 2 minutes, until slightly tender.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 10 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and basil.
Toss the breadcrumbs and vegan parmesan in a bowl.
Add the breadcrumb mixture to the skillet and toss to combine.
Drizzle with lemon juice and serve hot.
